# One-Week Work Schedule: New App Feature

**Monday**
*   **Time:** 09:00 – 17:00
*   **Activity:** Planning and initial **coding** setup for the backend architecture.
*   **Team Meeting:** 14:00 – 14:30 (Daily Standup)

**Tuesday**
*   **Time:** 09:00 – 11:00
*   **Activity:** collaborative **brainstorming session** regarding UI flow and feature scope.
*   **Time:** 13:00 – 17:00
*   **Activity:** Continued frontend component development (**coding**).

**Wednesday**
*   **Time:** 09:00 – 17:00
*   **Activity:** Core feature implementation (**coding**) and database schema optimization.
*   **Team Meeting:** 16:00 – 16:30 (Demo Session)

**Thursday**
*   **Time:** 09:00 – 16:00
*   **Activity:** Unit testing and bug identification (**testing** phase).
*   **Time:** 16:30 – 17:30
*   **Activity:** Integration review (**team meetings**).

**Friday**
*   **Time:** 09:00 – 12:00
*   **Activity:** Quality Assurance rounds (**testing**).
*   **Time:** 13:00 – 15:00
*   **Activity:** Project retrospective and documentation cleanup (**coding**).
*   **Team Meeting:** 15:00 – 15:30 (Weekly Wrap-up)

**Saturday**
*   **Time:** 10:00 – 10:00
*   **Activity:** **Testing** maintenance and monitoring dashboards.

**Sunday**
*   **Status:** Rest<|im_end|>

final_answer:
# One-Week Work Schedule: New App Feature

**Monday**
*   **Time:** 09:00 – 17:00
*   **Activity:** Planning and initial **coding** setup for the backend architecture.
*   **Team Meeting:** 14:00 – 14:30 (Daily Standup)

**Tuesday**
*   **Time:** 09:00 – 11:00
*   **Activity:** collaborative **brainstorming session** regarding UI flow and feature scope.
*   **Time:** 13:00 – 17:00
*   **Activity:** Continued frontend component development (**coding**).

**Wednesday**
*   **Time:** 09:00 – 17:00
*   **Activity:** Core feature implementation (**coding**) and database schema optimization.
*   **Team Meeting:** 16:00 – 16:30 (Demo Session)

**Thursday**
*   **Time:** 09:00 – 16:00
*   **Activity:** Unit testing and bug identification (**testing** phase).
*   **Time:** 16:30 – 17:30
*   **Activity:** Integration review (**team meetings**).

**Friday**
*   **Time:** 09:00 – 12:00
*   **Activity:** Quality Assurance rounds (**testing**).
*   **Time:** 13:00 – 15:00
*   **Activity:** Project retrospective and documentation cleanup (**coding**).
*   **Team Meeting:** 15:00 – 15:30 (Weekly Wrap-up)

**Saturday**
*   **Time:** 10:00 – 10:00
*   **Activity:** **Testing** maintenance and monitoring dashboards.

**Sunday**
*   **Status:** Rest<|im_end|>
